posts.text: Brainy, connected and wealthy cities have become even richer. But those in China’s hinterland lack the supply chains or talent to take advantage of the high-tech drive https://www.economist.com/china/2026/06/02/chinas-high-tech-rise-is-leaving-much-of-the-country-behind?taid=6a23b2b21738220001489b5b&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
It's official.

Game 3 of the NBA Finals between the New York Knicks and San Antonio Spurs is now the most expensive NBA game in history.

The cheapest ticket available? $10,622 per seat.

This game will shatter every previous record by a mile.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
